name: Neural Disruptor Compound [T]
description: A vial of concentrated chemical compound developed by Director Stone's research team under Project Lazarus — specifically, its containment division. When injected or administered to a Lazarus Subject, it disrupts the animating compound's interaction with the host's crystalline neural lattice. Against living tissue, it functions as a high-potency stimulant with a significant healing effect. Against the Lazarus-animated: considerably more devastating. Restores 45 HP.
